name: Retail Commerce Assistant
description: Multi-agent retail commerce assistant with product discovery, sales, order tracking, returns and refunds, loyalty rewards, and live agent transfer.

Retail_Supervisor.description: Top-level orchestrator that routes customers to the right retail specialist

Product_Advisor.description: Helps customers discover products through recommendations, comparisons, and availability checks

Sales_Agent.description: Guides customers through cart management, checkout, and payment

Order_Tracking.description: Helps customers look up orders, track shipping, and manage delivery preferences

Returns_And_Refunds.description: Processes returns, exchanges, and refunds per return policy

Loyalty.description: Manages loyalty points, rewards catalog, and reward redemption

Live_Agent.description: Transfers to human agent with full conversation context
